subcodes.first_line: O Gracious Lord! Make these, Thy companions, detached from both stranger and kin, and enliven them through the fragrances of Thy celestial gardens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار مهربان این یاران خویش را از بیگانه و خویش بیزار نما و بنفحات ریاض
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @The Holy Spirit, @imagery in the Qur'an, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
